title: Error while building Verilator on Cygwin on x86_64 Windows 7
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)
I am getting below error when trying to run below command. Also I tried running only make command but is giving same error.
I checked prerequisite like bison, flex, g++, python, perl, numactl.


```
make -j `nproc`
making verilator in src
make -C src
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src'
make -C obj_dbg -j 1  TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg.exe VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_coverage_bin_dbg.exe VL_DEBUG=1 VL_VLCOV=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial_vlcov
make -C obj_opt -j 1  TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin.exe -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src'
make[2]: warning: -j1 forced in submake: resetting jobserver mode.
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src'
make[2]: warning: -j1 forced in submake: resetting jobserver mode.
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial_vlcov'.
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'.
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_opt'
make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_coverage_bin_dbg.exe VL_DEBUG=1 VL_VLCOV=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'.
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg.exe VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
make -C obj_opt       TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin.exe -f ../Makefile_obj
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_opt'
ccache g++  -Og -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/local/share/verilator\" -c ../VlcMain.cpp -o VlcMain.o
      Compile flags:  g++ -Og -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/usr/local/share/verilator"
ccache g++  -O2 -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/local/share/verilator\" -c ../Verilator.cpp -o Verilator.o
      Compile flags:  g++ -Og -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/usr/local/share/verilator"
ccache g++  -Og -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/local/share/verilator\" -c ../Verilator.cpp -o Verilator.o
      Compile flags:  g++ -O2 -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/usr/local/share/verilator"
ccache g++  -O2 -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/local/share/verilator\" -c ../V3Active.cpp -o V3Active.o

make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:308: Verilator.o] Error 1
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/Meet/verilator/src/obj_dbg'

make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:308: VlcMain.o] Error 1
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
Unable to build verilator

What OS and distribution are you using?
Cygwin 64
Windows 7

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
Yes please i need solution for this.
